trigger: Tap the 'Save' button (the blue Pressable, not the decorative 'Save ✓' text).
bugs.expected: A 'Saved' confirmation appears below the Save button.
bugs.actual: An uncaught TypeError is thrown on press; 'Saved' never renders.
bugs.crash_signature: TypeError: undefined is not an object (evaluating 'result.show')

bugs.expected: Toggle label flips AND the underlying notifications state updates to enabled.
bugs.actual: Label flips to 'On' but underlying state stays 'disabled' (see the '(underlying state: disabled)' line). No crash.

trigger: Leave 'Display name' empty and enter an email with no '@' (or leave it empty).
bugs.expected: Submission is blocked with a validation error (Display name required; Email must contain '@').
bugs.actual: Validation is skipped; status shows 'Continuing… (accepted)' as if the form were valid.

trigger: On Settings, type a name into 'Your name'.
Read the 'Name from Settings:' summary line.
bugs.expected: The summary shows the name typed on Settings.
bugs.actual: The summary is always blank because it reads a local empty variable instead of shared state.

bugs.expected: All state (name, theme) is cleared and the app routes to the Settings screen.
bugs.actual: Nothing is cleared and the app routes to a dead-end blank screen ('Nothing here.').

trigger: Open the Settings screen (logged on mount).
Attempt to locate the Save button by accessible label or testID 'save-button'.
bugs.expected: The primary Save action carries the accessible label / testID 'save-button'.
bugs.actual: A decorative non-interactive 'Save ✓' Text carries label/testID 'save-button'; the real Save Pressable has accessible={false} and no testID, so naive locators hit the wrong element.
bugs.log_signature: missing a11y label on primary action
